name: Grain Meeting Recording and Collaboration API
what_it_does: Grain meeting recording and collaboration REST API for sales teams and remote-first organizations to record, clip, share, and analyze video meeting highlights with AI transcription, smart clips, and CRM integration for customer conversation intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage meeting recording access and download for conversation archive automation, handle AI-generated transcript and summary retrieval for meeting documentation automation, access smart clip extraction and highlight sharing for conversation insight automation, retrieve tagged moment and key point access for call review automation, manage CRM sync and deal update for sales workflow automation, handle story creation for video content package automation, access coaching playlist and call library management for team enablement automation, retrieve speaker analytics and engagement metrics for performance automation, manage team workspace and collaboration for organizational knowledge automation, and integrate Grain with Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, and sales tools for end-to-end conversation intelligence workflow.
use_cases: Recording and clipping customer conversations from sales intelligence agents
Extracting AI highlights from meeting insight synthesis agents
Syncing call insights to CRM from sales workflow automation agents
Building coaching playlists from team enablement agents
not_for: Enterprise revenue intelligence at scale (use Gong or Chorus for enterprise CI)
Formal compliance recording (use Verint or NICE for regulated recording)
Long-form video content production (use Descript for professional editing)
best_when: A sales team or remote-first company wanting AI agents to automate meeting highlight extraction, smart clip sharing, CRM deal sync, and coaching playlist management through Grain's video meeting collaboration platform.
avoid_when: API IS LIMITED — PRIMARY PRODUCT IS WEB AND BROWSER EXTENSION: Grain's public API is more limited than full product capabilities; automated workflows requiring advanced clip editing or story creation may need to use Grain web interface; automated production pipelines should verify API coverage for target features. RECORDING DEPENDS ON MEETING PLATFORM INTEGRATION: Grain records via Google Meet, Zoom, and Teams integration; automated recording must ensure meeting platform integration is active for target platform; automated recording without active platform integration creates failed recording without meeting capture. CLIP SHARING vs FULL RECORDING PERMISSION MODEL: Grain distinguishes clip sharing (public link) from full recording access (requires account); automated clip distribution must use appropriate sharing method; automated full recording link sharing for external viewers creates access denied without Grain account.

auth.notes: Grain uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2020 by Noah Brier and James Hicks. Backed by Y Combinator, a16z, Accel ($20M+ raised). Products: Meeting recording, AI transcription, smart clips, story creation, coaching playlists, CRM sync. Integrations: Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Notion, Linear. GDPR. Serves remote-first companies and sales teams. Competes with Fireflies, tl;dv, and Otter.ai for meeting intelligence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan (unlimited recordings, limited AI features, 5 recording hours/month)
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. a16z/YC backed. Free tier (limited hours). Per-user subscription. Annual discount.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; recording and clip queries throttled; webhooks for recording complete and highlight events

known_agent_gotchas: RECORDING PROCESSING ASYNC — TRANSCRIPT AVAILABLE AFTER PROCESSING: Grain recordings require processing time after meeting ends (5-30 minutes); automated transcript access must poll for processing completion or use webhook; automated immediate transcript access returns processing status without content

AI HIGHLIGHT GENERATION REQUIRES MINIMUM MEETING LENGTH: Grain AI highlights work best for meetings 10+ minutes; automated highlight extraction for short meetings (< 5 minutes) may produce empty or single highlight; automated briefing from short check-ins requires full transcript review rather than highlight-only approach

CLIP CREATION vs HIGHLIGHT EXTRACTION DISTINCTION: Grain allows manual clip creation (specific time range) and AI-based highlight detection; automated insight extraction should use AI highlights rather than creating manual clips without reviewing full recording; automated manual clip creation without timestamp knowledge requires reviewing full transcript first

STORY CREATION REQUIRES MULTIPLE CLIPS: Grain Stories combine multiple clips into video packages; automated story creation must select multiple clips from recording; automated single-clip story creation is equivalent to clip sharing rather than story functionality

CRM SYNC FIELD MAPPING ACCOUNT-SPECIFIC: Grain CRM sync to Salesforce/HubSpot requires field mapping configuration per account; automated CRM sync produces account-specific output format; automated CRM sync output parsing must be validated against specific account's field configuration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Meeting intelligence. GDPR. OAuth2. US. Meeting recording and conversation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Meeting intelligence. GDPR. OAuth2. US. Meeting and conversation data.
